service.name: DeepL Translate API
service.description_for_ai: Highest quality machine translation API. Supports 30+ languages with neural machine translation. Better than Google Translate for European languages. Free tier: 500,000 characters/month. Use when user needs to translate text between languages.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://www.deepl.com/pro-api — free tier available

capabilities.description_for_ai: Translate text from one language to another. Use for 'translate this to English', 'how do you say X in German', 'translate the document'. Supports 30+ languages. Auto-detects source language.

text.description: Array of texts to translate. E.g. ['Hello world', 'How are you?']

target_lang.description: Target language code: EN-US, EN-GB, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, PL, RU, ZH, JA, KO etc.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get list of supported languages. Use to show available translation directions to user.

agent_hints.lang_codes: English: EN-US or EN-GB. Russian: RU. German: DE. French: FR. Chinese: ZH. Japanese: JA. Korean: KO.
agent_hints.auto_detect: Omit source_lang to let DeepL auto-detect — works well for most cases.
agent_hints.formality_tip: Formality parameter only works for some languages (DE, FR, IT, ES, NL, PL, PT, RU). Use 'more' for business texts.
agent_hints.batch_tip: Send multiple texts in one request as an array — much more efficient than multiple single requests.
